name: Carrot and Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Young carrots, peeled and sliced crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the carrots in salted water until barely tender.
2. Mix all ingredients lightly.
3. Put into a pastry-lined pie pan and sprinkle with 1 tsp flour.
4. Dot with 1 tsp butter.
5. Cover with pastry.
6. Bake about 30 minutes in a very hot oven (425°F), or until apples are tender.
